site.name: Le Meynadier
site.place: in the heart of old Cannes

hero.title: Le Meynadier
hero.tagline2: in the heart of old Cannes.
hero.categories: Signature pizzas · Draft beers · House cocktails

signature.title: Signature
signature.tagline: Three pillars, one promise: fresh produce, homemade recipes, warm atmosphere — the way we've always loved them.

pizzas.title: Signature pizzas
pizzas.description: Thin crust, stone oven, homemade tomato sauce, fresh ingredients. Nine signature recipes, from the classic Margherita to the generous Raffinée with truffle oil.

drinks.title: Beers & wines
drinks.description: Three drafts at the bar — Pelforth, Affligem, Monaco — a selection of Belgian and international bottles, wines from Domaine Source Marine.

cocktails.title: House cocktails
cocktails.description: Spritz, Pina Colada, Dragon, Tabula — house recipes to sip at the bar or on the terrace, from lunch to the last glass.

ambiance.title: old Cannes
ambiance.p1: On rue Meynadier, two steps from Forville Market and the Croisette, Le Meynadier welcomes you in a warm setting: solid walnut wood, brass accents, fairy lights, lively terrace.
ambiance.quote: Turn a shopping street into a meeting point — from morning coffee to evening cocktail.
ambiance.p2: From the morning coffee to the evening cocktail, this is the spot for a quick lunch, drinks with friends, or an intimate dinner — seven days a week, year-round.

menuPreview.title: Menu
menuPreview.tagline: A handful of favourites — the full menu awaits on the next page.

margarita.name: Margherita
margarita.alt: Margherita pizza fresh from the stone oven
margarita.description: Oregano tomato sauce, mozzarella and basil — the unbeatable classic.

karmeliet.name: Triple Karmeliet
karmeliet.alt: Triple Karmeliet beer poured into a tulip glass
karmeliet.description: Belgian triple, 8.4% — generous, fruity, round, with a golden hue.

spritz.name: Spirit Spritz
spritz.alt: Spirit Spritz cocktail with orange and bubbles
spritz.description: Aperol, prosecco, sparkling water, orange — sunshine in a glass.

practical.title: Info
practical.tagline: Seven days a week — from morning coffee to evening cocktail.

hero.title: Menu
hero.tagline: Signature pizzas, paninis, draft beers, wines, house cocktails — generous cuisine, recipes we stand by.

cta.title: A table here?
cta.subtitle: Prices being verified — your server remains your best source.

section1.title: Place
section1.tagline: On the busiest pedestrian street of Cannes, Le Meynadier welcomes locals and visitors non-stop — from morning coffee to evening cocktail.

section2.title: Cuisine
section2.tagline: Thin-crust signature pizzas, grilled paninis, seasonal salads — designed to be good, generous, without fuss.
section2.p1: At the bar: three drafts — Pelforth Blonde, Affligem Blonde, Monaco — completed by an international bottle selection including Triple Karmeliet, a generous Belgian classic.
section2.p2: Wines from Domaine Source Marine and Côtes du Rhône by the glass, half-bottle or bottle. House cocktails, fresh smoothies, frappés and milkshakes for sunny Cannes afternoons.

quote.text: Turn a shopping street into a meeting point — from morning coffee to the last cocktail.
quote.author: Le Meynadier

section3.title: A week
section3.tagline: Year-round, non-stop — from morning coffee to the last glass.
section3.p1: Two steps from Forville Market and the Croisette, Le Meynadier is the spot for a quick lunch, drinks with friends, an intimate dinner.
section3.p2: Solid walnut wood, brass accents, fairy lights, lively terrace — a warm decor reminiscent of Mediterranean hinterlands.

cta.title: A table here?
cta.subtitle: On rue Meynadier, two steps from Forville Market. Every day, 8 am – 12:30 am.
